name: SynCodonLM
description: Generate embeddings for a DNA sequence or generate natural coding-DNA sequences for a protein sequence.
capabilities: Generate embeddings for a DNA sequence or generate natural coding-DNA sequences for a protein sequence

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for codon optimization or DNA sequence for embedding generation

mode.description: Mode of operation: 'embeddings' for DNA embeddings, 'generate' for coding DNA generation
